sourceOfTruth: Append new product or runtime guarantees to features[] and rerun npm run qa:matrix.
releaseRule: A feature is production-ready only when deterministic tests, live/backend smoke where applicable, traceability, privacy boundaries, and documented failure behavior are all present.

features.claim: Users can upload/view files and work with parsed spreadsheets in the same room.
features.productionGate: Parser fixtures, provider parser adapter tests, live file preview smoke, and Convex raw-file canonicalization.
liveChecks: manual browser: click file in left rail and return to Spreadsheet tab
features.nextReview: Add live Convex File Storage upload/download E2E once deployment auth is finalized.

features.claim: Public chat, private chat, public room agent, and private agent route messages to the right scope.
features.productionGate: Scope separation tests, room member proof, and browser smoke for public/private panels.
liveChecks: manual browser: public chat and private NodeAgent panels visible and usable
features.nextReview: Add browser E2E for public/private routing, optimistic send failure/retry, and stable clientMsgId bubble keys.

features.claim: Room trace supports approve/reject, host accept-all, and host-gated auto-accept with remembered consent.
features.productionGate: Host-only controls, proposal resolution tests, UI consent modal, and no silent direct-write bypass.
liveChecks: manual browser: turn auto-allow on, confirm modal, run collaboration, accept all proposals
features.nextReview: Add audit assertion that accept-all records every accepted proposal id.

features.claim: GTM, finance, parser, wiki, and cross-file operation workflows are covered by deterministic professional evals and live provider smoke.
features.productionGate: Deterministic workflow evals pass, provider parser smoke is green, and model routes are ladder-gated before interactive promotion.
features.nextReview: Add dedicated live GTM and finance provider jobs with row-level trace assertions.

features.claim: The agent can read spreadsheets, write notes/wiki updates, reconcile cells, and keep cross-artifact evidence links.
features.productionGate: Cross-file RoomTools test, grounded wiki write test, and CAS conflict checks.
liveChecks: manual browser: run collaboration and inspect note/wiki/spreadsheet trace
features.nextReview: Add LLM-generated wiki update eval with private-data leakage checks.

features.claim: Users can create and delete post-its through versioned room operations.
features.productionGate: Create/delete operation tests and browser smoke for Wall tab.
liveChecks: manual browser: Wall tab Post-it add/delete
features.nextReview: Add multi-user wall edit conflict browser test.

features.claim: Multiple users can join, see reactive state, use public/private scopes, and avoid clobbering through locks/CAS/proposals/drafts.
features.productionGate: Room auth proof, Convex codegen/typecheck, duplicate-operation idempotency, load/concurrency smoke, and deployment observability.
features.nextReview: Add concurrent browser/session load test and production SLO dashboard.

features.claim: Free-auto provider work can run as sliced jobs that checkpoint before platform limits and resume from durable state.
features.productionGate: Forced multi-slice test, crash-after-checkpoint resume, duplicate stale lease rejection, and live /free smoke.
features.nextReview: Add stricter budget clamps, per-tool abort propagation, provider request idempotency keys where supported, model health/quarantine, and real forced multi-slice Convex job-runner tests.

features.claim: Provider file/cache ids stay separate from Convex raw file ids while extraction writes evidence-bearing CellPayloads.
features.productionGate: Adapter separation tests, live provider smoke, redacted errors, and artifact evidence checks.
features.nextReview: Add production provider Files API binary upload actions for PDFs/images/decks.

features.claim: The QA matrix, README cockpit, and visual graphs are generated from one appendable source of truth.
features.productionGate: Matrix schema tests plus qa:matrix --check as a docs-sync drift gate, not a quality gate.
features.nextReview: Require each new user-facing feature PR to append or update one matrix row.

features.claim: The real React UI is verified against a live/local Convex backend for optimistic reactivity, rollback, cross-user visibility, and privacy boundaries.
features.productionGate: Playwright or equivalent real-browser specs for two-context cell edits, optimistic chat failure/retry, public/private leak checks, wall CRUD, job controls, and proposal conflict feedback.
liveChecks: missing: Playwright real-browser harness against local Convex backend
features.nextReview: Install and wire the real-DOM harness, add data-testid hooks only for asserted surfaces, and promote the row after the first two-context specs pass in CI.

features.claim: The desktop shell follows Room/Deal Binder -> Work Surface -> Copilot, with proofs, sources, and gold comparisons opening on the center stage instead of competing side or bottom panels.
features.productionGate: Browser layout E2E proves wide desktop binder, center work surface, right Copilot, tablet binder collapse, mobile tabs/sheets, no overflow, and no lost spreadsheet affordances.
liveChecks: missing: Playwright shell spec against local app and live Convex room
missing: Gemini UI judge walkthrough for the June 2026 target
features.nextReview: Replace the MVP four-peer-panel composition with Binder -> Work Surface -> Copilot after browser specs prove navigation, center split, responsive collapse, and right-side steering.

features.claim: The bottom UI separates configurable ambient Signal Tape from the authoritative non-scrolling Status Strip for commit, conflict, eval, sync, cost, and runtime truth.
features.productionGate: DOM/browser tests prove two distinct bottom rows, pause/reduced-motion/filter behavior, click-to-open related artifact, no unauthorized private data in the tape, and precise non-scrolling status events.
liveChecks: missing: live/browser smoke for room, source, agent, risk, eval, and cost status events
features.nextReview: Extract trace/status out of the artifact panel into a shell-level status contract before publishing the June shell as current product behavior.

features.claim: Every user message is classified as command, steering patch, parallel subagent, wait, clarification, note, cancel, or priority change; the deterministic harness computes PlanPreview and owns scheduling authority.
features.productionGate: Unit/runtime evals prove affected-set expansion, partial scheduling, intent claims, short commit leases, dedupe, cost authorization, privacy/formula checks, and that the LLM recommends while the harness schedules.
liveChecks: missing: browser plan-preview routing badges smoke
features.nextReview: Promote only after PlanPreview is a typed artifact and scheduler decisions are checked before expensive model work.

features.claim: The spreadsheet work surface has an explicit workbook-runtime adapter path for command/mutation/operation separation, formula dependency expansion, worker/headless validation, and spreadsheet-native overlays.
features.productionGate: A POC loads the Q3 sheet into a candidate runtime, captures local mutations into Convex CAS ops, replays remote patches, preserves focus/selection, renders evidence/human/agent overlays, and runs headless formula/gold validation.
features.nextReview: Run the workbook-runtime POC before treating a workbook runtime as more than an architecture option.

features.claim: The public demo tracks public-document finance and no-clobber proof rows with source URLs, expected answers, validators, and stable fingerprints.
features.productionGate: Manifest check, public fixture downloader/cache hash, LiteParse/provider extraction, formula/citation/page or bbox validators, CellPayload evidence, and trace read/write-set validators all pass.
liveChecks: missing: public fixture downloader plus live parser/provider eval
features.nextReview: Do not call the public proof board a live parser proof until public fixtures are downloaded, extracted, and scored against the same manifest.

features.claim: Private banker-model evals are tracked as model plus NodeRoom harness proof across solve, guide, collaborate, reconstruction, export, formula, value, citation, no-clobber, and trace dimensions.
features.productionGate: Current solve batch stays fresh; guide zero-write, collaborate human-agent injection, withheld-data reconstruction, XLSX export/reopen, formula AST/value tie-out, citation coverage, and trace completeness lanes are added.
features.nextReview: Keep Solve measured, not best-run; add Guide/Collaborate/Reconstruction/export before claiming full banker work-product coverage.

features.claim: NodeRoomBench-style results report final artifact, formula, format/usability, collaboration trajectory, privacy, cost, latency, model route, harness, tool policy, budget, and evaluator instead of raw model-only scores.
features.productionGate: Eval store records required metadata; eval:diff catches regressions, removed cases, model swaps, and check redefinitions; external benchmark adapters run benchmark-faithful mode without hidden gold access, evaluator edits, public answer lookup, or hardcoded cases.
liveChecks: missing: external benchmark-faithful contamination/hidden-gold adapter tests
features.nextReview: Add a NodeRoomBench package outline with cases, artifacts, gold, runners, validators, and allowed/disallowed harness policy.

features.claim: Every mutating or long-running NodeAgent request uses a durable agentJobs root with request envelope, operation accounting, leases, and links to runs/steps; private read-only advise remains a one-call private reply.
features.productionGate: Interactive /ask and /free both create or reuse agentJobs, artifact writes emit receipts, job details are browser-visible, notebook graph mutations enqueue embeddings, and live browser/backend smoke proves linked runs/steps.
liveChecks: browser: run /ask and confirm linked job row plus latest run/attempt details
features.nextReview: Replace source-only graph/embedding checks with Convex runtime tests, add browser assertion for the job detail drilldown, and add stale-receipt replay tests.

features.claim: Live traces, workflow feedback, eval gates, UI media review, and Codex handoff artifacts continuously fuel README evidence.
features.productionGate: Deterministic loop passes, live provider/Convex/UI media lanes run when keys are present, and failures generate a handoff before chart promotion.
features.nextReview: Rerun the full-live loop under the v3 benchmark with provider, free-auto ladder, Convex, and media lanes current; promote only after repeated clean runs without skipped required lanes.

features.claim: README walkthrough GIFs, workflow previews, and narrated episodes are judged as product evidence, not just attractive demos.
features.productionGate: Gemini 3.5 Flash batch-judges every GIF/MP4 after capture/render refresh; P0 defects block publishing and P1 defects stay visible until fixed.
features.nextReview: Fix every current P1 defect listed under Open Defects in docs/eval/MEDIA_JUDGE.md, then rerun the batch judge and promote only when no P1/P0 defects remain.

features.claim: README, video, and interview proof artifacts translate NodeRoom features into researched high-trust professional workflow scenes instead of generic AI demos.
features.productionGate: Audience context YAML, scenario brief, trust-signal checklist, deterministic content-fluency gate, rendered audience-specific episode, and video/content judge evidence with current media defects tracked.
features.nextReview: Close the current media-judge P1 defects and run a content-fluency/trust-signal review before promoting this row to green.

modelLadder.gate: Interactive collaboration routes must pass L1-L4 for lock/CAS/draft safety.

routes.recommendedUse: eligible for interactive collaboration promotion after repeated runs
opt-in /free only; hit step budget on L2 despite correct value/provenance and timed out L4
not promotable; summarizes routed top free candidates, see concrete rows
best free candidate for /free; not interactive because L4 times out
do not route; invalid JSON in live ladder
do not route; provider retry errors in live ladder
not safe; mutates during read and misses required draft
do not route; provider retry errors in live ladder
research benchmark winner candidate only when collaboration safety is not required
requires rerun because L2 time-budget failure blocks promotion
